text: - HIGH [composer.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/ui/composer.rs:58), [app.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/app.rs:428), [app.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/crates/29er-tui/src/app.rs:671): mentions are shell-derived and effectively broken. Composer inserts `@display_name`, dispatch sends only `content`, and unread mention tier checks for `@<my_pubkey>` in previews. Dispatch selected mention pubkeys and derive mention tiers from NMP event tags/projection state.
